state.next-action: The composer direction changed: shared sections should be removed entirely. Resume `18-06` using the simplified page model of page-local blocks plus code-owned app blocks and future dynamic data blocks. The next execution pass should strip shared-section UI and data paths, then focus on page-local block copy/media editing with special attention to reliable media replacement, block-specific copy controls, and clean behavior boundaries for `contactRequest`, `serviceEstimator`, and similar integrations. Supporting notes remain in `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-layout-first-page-model-hero-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-instant-quote-app-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-composer-media-target-model.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-08-cms-route-gating-and-block-actions.md`, and `.planning/todos/2026-04-08-resend-delivery-and-customer-email-verification.md`.
